title: Tamizhukku Amethendru Per Lyrics Panchavarna Kili
stanzas:
Tamizhukkum amuthendru paer
andha tamizh
inbath tamizh engal
uyirukku naer uyirukku naer (2)

Tamizhukku nilavendru paer
inbath Tamizh engal
samugathin vilaivukku neer

inbath tamizh engal

Tamizhukku madhuvendru paer

Tamizhukkum amuthendru paer
andha tamizh inbathtamizh engal
uyirukku naer uyirukku naer

Tamizh engal illamaikku paal
Tamizh engal illamaikku paal
inbath tamizh nalla
pugazhmikka pulavarkku vael
pulavarkku vael

Tamizh engal uyarvukku vaan
inbath tamizh engal

sudar thandha thaen

Tamizhukkum amuthendru paer
andha tamizh inbathtamizh engal
uyirukku naer uyirukku naer

Tamizh engal arivukku thoal
inbath tamizh engal

vairathin vaal

Tamizh engal piravikku thaai
inbath tamizh engal
valamikka ulamutra thee (2)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song celebrates the beauty and richness of the Tamil language, emphasizing its importance in the lives of its speakers.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Panchavarna Kili, the song reflects the protagonist's pride in their Tamil heritage and serves as a heartfelt tribute to the culture.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by the renowned playback singer P. Susheela, known for her emotive voice and contribution to Tamil music.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for this song was composed by the legendary duo Viswanathan–Ramamoorthy, who are celebrated for their impactful melodies.

When was this song released?

Tamizhukkum Amuthendru Per was released on January 28, 1970.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Tamizhukkum Amuthendru Per, the lyrics convey a deep sense of pride and love for the Tamil language, celebrating its beauty and significance. The song serves as a heartfelt reminder of the cultural richness that Tamil embodies. With P. Susheela's emotive voice, listeners are transported to a place of nostalgia and reverence for their heritage. This classic piece resonates with anyone who values their roots and the essence of Tamil identity.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Tamizhukkum Amuthendru Per from Panchavarna Kili is a timeless classic that beautifully encapsulates the essence of Tamil pride and culture. With P. Susheela's soulful rendition, this song resonates deeply with anyone who cherishes their roots. Experience the enchanting melodies crafted by the legendary Viswanathan–Ramamoorthy duo that make this track unforgettable.
